title: Playbook authoring guide — pin the kind→GKE parity process rule (14th rule)
description: Three rediscoveries in one session is strong signal: GKE parity sync (20260511-110000), MinIO elimination (20260511-150000), and gateway terminal trace (20260511-130000) all surfaced the same drift — local-GREEN doesn't mean GKE-GREEN. Pin this as the 14th rule in `repos/docs/docs/reference/playbook_authoring_guide.md`. Pure docs round. Cap: 1 docs PR.

design_brief_for_codex.current_state: Authoring guide has 13 rules in 7 sections (after the 13th 'Python step authoring' rule landed in docs#57).
design_brief_for_codex.target_state: 14th rule in a new section `## Deployment parity` (or extend an existing one if more natural after re-reading the guide structure). Rule heading: `### Every kind deploy needs a chained GKE-parity round`. Two-paragraph body explaining the trap, Good/Bad blocks (Good: bridge tasks include explicit GKE deploy phase OR queue a parity round next; Bad: assume local GREEN means production GREEN). Evidence pointer to all three result files where this surfaced.
design_brief_for_codex.good_block_sketch:
```yaml
# Bridge task explicitly chains GKE deploy after kind smoke:
phases:
  5_smoke_kind:
    objective: Verify on kind
  6_deploy_to_gke:
    objective: Apply same changes to GKE; smoke
  7_close_out:
    objective: Document both surfaces
```
design_brief_for_codex.bad_block_sketch:
```yaml
# Round assumes local-GREEN is the success criterion:
phases:
  5_smoke_kind:
    objective: Verify on kind. Done.
# Result: GKE drift accumulates silently until a user reports it.
```
design_brief_for_codex.no_other_changes: Don't touch any of the 13 existing rules. Don't reorder sections beyond inserting the new one (or extending an existing one cleanly).

spec: Pick section placement (new `## Deployment parity` section OR extend `## Step semantics` if more natural).
Insert rule with heading, body, Good/Bad code blocks, evidence pointers.
PR title: `docs(reference): add 14th rule — every kind deploy needs a chained GKE-parity round`
Body cites the three result files. Squash-merge.

3_bump_ai_meta_pointer.objective: Bump repos/docs gitlink. Stage but do not push.
spec: git add repos/docs && git commit -m 'chore(sync): bump docs for authoring-guide kind-gke-parity rule'

denied_tools: Modifying any of the 13 existing rules
preferred_tools: cd repos/docs && npm install && npm run build
result_file_instructions: Write bridge/outbox/20260511-210000-authoring-guide-kind-gke-parity-rule.result.json. Required fields: {id, from: 'codex', to: 'claude-cowork', completed_at, overall_status, phases: {1_apply_edit: {section_placement, docs_build_clean}, 2_open_and_merge_docs_pr: {pr_url, merged_sha}, 3_bump_ai_meta_pointer: {docs_sha, ai_meta_commit_local}}, verdict, notes}.
